name: Slightly Potted Cocktail Franks
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Cocktail Frankfurters, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cocktail franks by cutting them in half.
2. Place the halved franks into small pots or jars.
3. Seal the containers tightly to ensure freshness.
4. Store the potted franks in a cool place until ready to use.
